title: Aaib Investigation To Cessna T210m N761j

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
AAIB investigation to Cessna T210M, N761JU. Cessna T210M (N761JU), loss of control on takeoff, Leeds East Airport, 11 April 2024

The AAIB has sent a team to Sherburn in Elmet Airfield, North Yorkshire. A team of inspectors has been sent to Sherburn in Elmet Airfield, North Yorkshire to begin investigating a light aircraft accident which occurred on Sunday 2 November

The AAIB has sent a team to Doncaster. A team of inspectors has been sent to Doncaster to begin investigating a helicopter accident which occurred on Thursday 30 October

sections.heading: Context
sections.content: These developments affect aviation connectivity, airspace management, and surface access to airports. Readers interested in Scottish aviation heritage may find parallels in the industrial and operational history documented in our research volumes.
